metadata.description: Authoritative Go skills for Claude Code — written by spf13 (creator of Cobra, Viper, Hugo). Covers idiomatic Go patterns and CLI architecture.

plugins.name: go
plugins.description: Idiomatic Go patterns and best practices — package design, error handling, interfaces, concurrency, testing, and project layout.

plugins.name: cobra-viper
plugins.description: Definitive CLI architecture guide using Cobra and Viper — command-first design, 12-factor config, and proper testing patterns.
